历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 3452 → 3353 → 5886 → 7668 → 6295. Since 2023, the ranking has significantly shifted backward, peaking at 7668 in 2024 before rebounding to 6295 in 2025. The fluctuations over the past three years have been severe, with the 2025 baseline around 6,295. The enrollment plans for Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 were 223 → 219 → 226 → 228 → 220 respectively. In 2026, the Physics Category plans for 189 students plus 25 for Medical Category, totaling 214, representing a slight reduction of about 2.7% compared to the 220 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 8th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking (up from 9th in 2021–2024), firmly in the national Top 10, indicating an extremely high school level. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving multiple public opinion incidents such as campus safety, teacher ethics, and academic misconduct, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. However, Douyin popularity is high (overall rank 19), with considerable attention on short video platforms, reflecting no low application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 20 disciplines rated A- or above, including A+ in Law, Marxist Theory, Geophysics, and Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology, A in Water Conservancy Engineering, Biology, etc., demonstrating strong disciplinary strength and strong appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for engineering majors such as Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, and Electronic Information continues to heat up. In 2026, Guangdong Province has 456,000 Physics Category candidates, an increase of about 3.6% from 440,208 in 2025, expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition. Wuhan University is located in Hubei, not a local university in Guangdong. Guangdong is a major source province for students, and candidates have a strong willingness to apply to top 985 universities outside the province, leading to fierce cross-provincial competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuations, the slight enrollment reduction in 2026, the expansion of the candidate pool, and the school's reputation and public opinion factors: the enrollment reduction and increase in candidates jointly push up competition, but negative public opinion may partially suppress application enthusiasm. Based on the 2025 baseline of 6,295, the minimum ranking for 2026 is expected to move slightly forward to about 6,112, with a range of 5,612–6,612.

prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来报考热度持续高涨，临床医学、口腔医学等长学制专业尤其受到高分考生青睐。武汉大学医学类在广东省招生规模相对稳定（约19-25人），属于小而精的招生 模式，竞争较为激烈。2026年招生专业进一步细化，新增临床医学（卓越医师班）、口腔医学（卓越医师班）等特色班型，有望吸引更多优质生源。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Wuhan University's medical programs in Guangdong Province over the past five years are: 2021: 3452 (planned 22 students), 2022: 3066 (planned 21 students), 2023: 2893 (planned 23 students), 2024: 10143 (planned 19 students), 2025: 6004 (planned 25 students). The significant drop in ranking to 10143 in 2024 was mainly due to the expansion of the Public Health and Preventive Medicine category from 4 to 10 students, lowering the overall admission threshold; in 2025, the plan increased to 25 students, and the ranking rebounded to 6004. In 2026, the total plan for medical programs is 25 students, unchanged from 2025, with a plan change rate of 0, and the main supply-demand elasticity value is 6004.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university of the national 985 Project and 211 Project, and is selected as a national Double First-Class construction university (Class A). As a comprehensive top-tier institution, its medical school has a long history of running schools and strong faculty. Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, and other majors enjoy high reputations nationwide, exerting a sustained attraction for Guangdong candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors has been rising, with long-cycle programs such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology particularly favored by high-scoring candidates. The enrollment scale of Wuhan University's medical programs in Guangdong Province is relatively stable (about 19-25 students), adopting a small but refined enrollment model, leading to intense competition. In 2026, the enrollment majors are further refined, with new characteristic class types such as Clinical Medicine (Excellent Physician Class) and Stomatology (Excellent Physician Class), which are expected to attract more high-quality students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the above factors, the minimum admission ranking for Wuhan University's medical programs in Guangdong Province in 2026 is predicted to be 5914, slightly higher than in 2025 (smaller ranking number, easier admission), with a fluctuation range of 5677 to 6151. The ranking in 2025 has significantly rebounded from the low point in 2024, and with the plan unchanged in 2026, the ranking is expected to continue a slight rebound but with a narrowing amplitude, overall tending to stabilize.
